calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: V. Mack/M. Vallejo, CSR: Janet Pond
Appearances:
Lloyd Ray Crenna, Esq. for Plaintiff Thornley & Pitt, Inc., with witness Jeanne Burns, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Tam P. Tran, an individual and DBA Nu Image.
Principal/Damages of $38,400.69
Costs of $391.50
Interest of $8,142.40
Punitive Damages of $5,000.00 For the total of $51,934.59

Documents submitted during last court date returned to counsel.
Judgment signed in open court.

(This case related to #400430 Thornley & Pitt v. Bui, under a different cause of action. Court is satisfied it is able to proceed)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2003 Continued To Nov-21-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-22-2003 Continued To Oct-09-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Mary Ellen Scherer
Appearances:
Lloyd Crenna, Esq. for Plaintiff Thornley & Pitt, Inc., and Jean Burns, plaintiff's witness, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court continues the matter to OCT-09-2003 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 218 in order to review copies of documents given relative to case #400430. Counsel in the present case is seeking punitive damages.
